mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bili_nft_item_attribute ( item_id, nft_id, trait_type, trait_value, trait_count, rarity_rate, crawl_time ) VALUES
( #{item.itemId}, #{item.nftId}, #{item.traitType}, #{item.traitValue}, #{item.traitCount}, #{item.rarityRate}, #{item.crawlTime} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE item_id = VALUES(item_id), trait_count = VALUES(trait_count), rarity_rate = VALUES(rarity_rate), crawl_time = VALUES(crawl_time)
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT(trait_type, '||', trait_value) AS traitValue, COUNT(DISTINCT nft_id) AS count FROM bili_nft_item_attribute WHERE item_id = #{itemId} GROUP BY trait_type, trait_value ORDER BY trait_type ASC, count DESC, trait_value ASC

SELECT DISTINCT base.nft_id FROM bili_nft_item_attribute base WHERE base.item_id = #{itemId}
ORDER BY base.nft_id ASC
